content:
Hi everyone,
I'm building a free web app called Print My Paper that lets anyone generate and print paper templates in seconds.
Current features include:
📄 Lined paper
📐 Graph paper
• Dot grid
📚 Cornell notes
🎼 Music staff paper
🎬 Storyboard templates
✍️ Calligraphy guides
⬡ Hexagonal & isometric grids
🇨🇳 Chinese practice grids
📋 Project planner
📥 PDF & SVG downloads
📱 Mobile-friendly interface
🚫 No signup or watermark
The goal is to make it useful for students, teachers, artists, engineers, musicians, designers, and anyone who needs printable paper without searching through dozens of websites.
I'd really appreciate honest feedback:
Which templates would you actually use?
What's missing?
Any features that would make you choose this over existing printable paper websites?
Is there anything that would annoy you as a user?
I'm building this as a solo developer and every suggestion helps improve it.
Link: https://my-react-website-five.vercel.app/
